title: Simply BF819 Alloy Blade Fuse Assortment, Ideal for Vehicle Use, 10 Pieces and 7 Types 5A 7.5A 10A 15A 20A 25A 30A Multi-Function Car Fuse, Set of 10
features: ZINC DESIGN — specifically designed for amp, cars, trucks, car amp, i20 car, mini atm, rv, atc, ford, taxi, SUV, boat, general DC applications etc.

VALUE FOR MONEY — package includes: 1 x 5Amp Gold Blade Fuse, 1 x 7.5Amp Brown Blade Fuse, 2 x 10Amp Red Blade Fuse, 2 x 15Amp Blue Blade Fuse, 2 x 20Amp Yellow Blade Fuse, 1 x 25Amp Clear Blade Fuse, 1 x 30Amp Green Blade Fuse.
OVERLOAD PROTECTION — protect your car and your electrical device from short circuit, overload etc.
COLOUR CODED — our blade fuses are colour coded for confident and easy installation.
description: From the manufacturer Simply Quality All Simply products are quality tested and offer excellent performance and durability. Products conform to industry standards and come certified where appropriate. SIMPLY AUTO Automotive Parts & Accessories Simply Auto offers a wide range of products that feature all essential vehicle accessories. The range includes both entry level and high-end products for improved performance, repair and maintenance. Although Simply Auto covers many areas of motoring, one thing the product offering has in common is excellent value for money which often can't be beaten by the competition. Simply Auto products can be found in all major automotive stores in the UK and are well represented across the world!
